title: Monitoring of Closure Orders. The MWPB and/or the Regional Offices
content: 17 shall monitor establishments that are subject of closure orders. Establishments violating 18 closure orders shall be penalized for contempt as provided under the Implementing Rules 19 and Regulations of R.A. No. 11641. 20 21 22 Accommodation Facilities 23 24
